attacking_style: Not an attacker. Pure domestique role focused on team service rather than personal results. When in breakaways, it's for team insurance rather than victory ambitions.
team_tactics: Deployed strategically in early breaks to provide positional insurance and force rival teams to chase. Serves as road captain orchestrating leadout trains and controlling race flow for team leaders.
terrain_preference: Classics terrain and controlled flat stages where his diesel engine and tactical positioning add value. Surprisingly capable on climbs when motivated for team duty, able to bridge significant gaps.
vulnerability: Team becomes tactically exposed when he crashes or is absent, indicating irreplaceable organizational role. His personal ambitions are non-existent, making him invisible when team doesn't need coverage.
key_patterns: Placed in early breaks for team insurance, not personal glory (2 races)
Functions as road captain; team struggles tactically without him (2 observations)
Shows unexpected climbing capacity when serving team needs, bridging large gaps (1 major example)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent domestique role maintained across years. 2021 absence highlighted importance rather than indicating declining form.
